name: South India Grand Tour
overview: Explore the best of Chennai, Mahabalipuram, Pondicherry, Ooty, Mysore, Bangalore, Cochin with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: – Chennai welcome on arrival at int’l airport in chennai
itinerary.description: – Chennai welcome on arrival at int’l airport in chennai. transfer to a hotel. overnight stay at hotel in chennai

itinerary.title: – Chennai sightseeing: After breakfast, Proceed for a city tour visiting Sri par
itinerary.description: – Chennai sightseeing: After breakfast, Proceed for a city tour visiting Sri parthasarathy temple, kapaleeshwar temple, fort st.george, government museum,marina beach. Evening free at leisure. Dinner & overnight stay at a hotel in Chennai.

itinerary.title: – Chennai – kanchipuram – mahabalipuram: After breakfast, drive to mahabalipuram
itinerary.description: – Chennai – kanchipuram – mahabalipuram: After breakfast, drive to mahabalipuram. Via sightseeing of kanchipuram (kamakshi amman temple, kailasanathar temple, ekambareshwar temple). On arrival check-in at the hotel. Afternoon proceed for sightseeing and visit the sea shore temple, the five rathas. Dinner & overnight stay at a hotel in mahabalipuram.

itinerary.title:
– Mahabalipuram – Pondichery*
                    Breakfast at hotel
itinerary.description:
– Mahabalipuram – Pondichery*
                    Breakfast at hotel. Drive to pondicherry. On arrival check-in at hotel.proceed for city tour visiting aurobindo ashram and pondicherry museum day free at leisure. Enjoy the beautiful beaches. dinner & overnight stay at a hotel in pondicherry.

itinerary.title:
– Pondicherry – Tirchy – Thanjavur*
                    Breakfast at hotel
itinerary.description:
– Pondicherry – Tirchy – Thanjavur*
                    Breakfast at hotel. Drive to thanjavur enroute visiting the rock fort temple in trichy. Upon arrival check in at the hotel. Afternoon proceed for a tour round tanjore city visiting the various temples, outstanding among them is the brihadeswara temple. Dinner & overnight stay at hotel in thanjavur.

itinerary.title:
– Thanjavur – Madurai
                    Breakfast at hotel
itinerary.description:
– Thanjavur – Madurai
                    Breakfast at hotel. Drive to madurai. On arrival check-in at the hotel. Afternoon sightseeing of famous meenakshi temple, a splendid example of dravidian architecture, thirumalai nayak mahal and gandhi museum. Dinner & overnight stay at a hotel in madurai.

itinerary.title:
– Thanjavur – Madurai
                    Breakfast at hotel
itinerary.description:
– Thanjavur – Madurai
                    Breakfast at hotel. Drive to madurai. On arrival check-in at the hotel. Afternoon sightseeing of famous meenakshi temple, a splendid example of dravidian architecture, thirumalai nayak mahal and gandhi museum. Dinner & overnight stay at a hotel in madurai.

itinerary.title: – Madurai – Thekkady Breakfast at hotel
itinerary.description: – Madurai – Thekkady Breakfast at hotel. drive to thekkady. On arrival check into the hotel. In the afternoon visit periyar-one of the finest wildlife reserves in the world and enjoy boat cruises on periyar lake. Dinner & overnight stay at hotel in thekkady

itinerary.title:
– Thekkady – Kumarkom – Alappuzha*
                    Breakfast at hotel
itinerary.description:
– Thekkady – Kumarkom – Alappuzha*
                    Breakfast at hotel. Drive to kumarakom. On arrival check-in to the house boat. Full day enjoy back water cruise. Dinner & overnight on a houseboat.

itinerary.title:
– Alappuzha – Cochin
                    Breakfast at houseboat
itinerary.description:
– Alappuzha – Cochin
                    Breakfast at houseboat. Straight drive to Cochin. On arrival check-in at the hotel. After some rest proceed for city tour visiting dutch palace, jewish synagogue, st.francis church, dutch cemetery, chinese fishing nets at the entrance of cochin harbour & willingdon island. Day free at leisure. Dinner & overnight stay at a hotel in Cochin.

itinerary.title:
– Cochin – Ooty
                    Breakfast at hotel
itinerary.description:
– Cochin – Ooty
                    Breakfast at hotel. Drive to Ooty. On arrival check-in at the hotel. Day free at leisure. Dinner & overnight stay at a hotel in Ooty.

itinerary.title:
– Ooty – Mysore
                    Breakfast at hotel proceeds for sightseeing,
itinerary.description:
– Ooty – Mysore
                    Breakfast at hotel proceeds for sightseeing, visiting botanical garden, Ooty lake, Doddabetta (highest point in ooty). Afternoon drive to mysore. On arrival check-in at the hotel. Dinner & overnight stay at a hotel in Mysore.

itinerary.title:
– Mysore
                    Breakfast at hotel
itinerary.description:
– Mysore
                    Breakfast at hotel. Proceed for a city tour visiting mysore palace (the residence of the royal family), Chamundi hills (temple of goddess chamundeshwari.) lunch at the hotel. Evening visit vrindavan garden (one of the best in south india.). Dinner & overnight stay at hotel in mysore

itinerary.title:
– Mysore – Bangalore
                    Breakfast at hotel
itinerary.description:
– Mysore – Bangalore
                    Breakfast at hotel. Drive to Bangalore via Srirangapatna (fort & temples) & Somnathpur (famous for its 13th century hoysala temple). On arrival check-in at the hotel. Day free at leisure. Dinner & overnight stay at a hotel in Bangalore.

itinerary.title:
– Bangalore – Chennai
                    Breakfast at hotel
itinerary.description:
– Bangalore – Chennai
                    Breakfast at hotel. Proceed for a city tour visiting Vidhana Soudha (houses the state legislative assembly of karnataka), tipu’s palace (summer palace of tipu sultan -1781-1791 ad. ), lal bagh botanical garden. Timely transfer to airport to board on flight for onward journey.
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
Please note: House Boat on Demand
Inclusions
Accommodation
Welcome Drink Non Alcoholic.
Welcome drink at hotel
Meals
All Transfers, All

seo.title: South India Grand Tour | Mother India Tour Travels
seo.description: Book South India Grand Tour with Mother India Tour Travels. Best deals on Chennai, Mahabalipuram, Pondicherry, Ooty, Mysore, Bangalore, Cochin tour packages. Includes hotels, transport & guide.
